caption: A recording of a computer screen shows a web browser open to a video presentation. The primary focus of the screen is a black background featuring green text that reads "Trial & Learning" and "An Insightful Journey" positioned beneath it. In the upper right corner, a small video feed shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt, looking toward the camera. The browser tabs at the top of the screen are visible, with titles such as "Trial & Learning by Syntenik," "Future of Society by Syntenik," and "Insights Introduction Kuma." A small white mouse cursor is visible on the right side of the black screen. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains static; the text, the man in the video feed, and the browser layout do not change position or content.
